mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in industrial production signals a strengthening demand cycle that boosts corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that compresses wage growth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in tightening labor periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month decline in the federal funds rate signals a monetary easing cycle that boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing starts signals a strengthening supply cycle that boosts corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening supply periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in real disposable personal income signals a strengthening demand cycle that boosts consumer spending, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening labor periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
